sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
    max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
    max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
    print(n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], f'r{min_r}-{max_r}', f'c{min_c}-{max_c}')
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
